General.Name: Orege Société Anonyme
General.Description: Orege Société Anonyme designs, develops, operates, manufactures, and markets municipal and industrial sludge solutions in France, the United States, Germany, and the United Kingdom. The company offers equipment rental with or without an operator. The company is headquartered in Paris, France. Orege Société Anonyme is a subsidiary of Eren Groupe SA.
General.Address: 37 Rue de la Pérouse, Paris, France, 75016
